description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a tan and brown color scheme, featuring a detachable box magazine and a collapsible stock. The rifle is equipped with a suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, enhancing its stealth capabilities. A prominent sighting system is mounted on the top rail, likely a red dot or holographic sight, for rapid target acquisition. The handguard and receiver are streamlined, with visible rails for accessory attachment. The magazine is semi-transparent, allowing for visual round count. The overall design suggests a lightweight, modular firearm suitable for urban operations.
description: A tan tactical rifle with a suppressor, collapsible stock, detachable box magazine, and mounted sight, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, collapsible stock, mounted sight, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, sight, and details of the handguard and suppressor.
